allow: Bash(awk -F= 'NF>1 {name=$1; val=$0; sub\(/^[^=]*=/,"",val\); gsub\(/^"|"$/,"",val\); print name, "len="length\(val\)}' .env.local)
Bash(curl -s -X POST http://localhost:3001/api/enrich -H "Content-Type: application/json" -d '{"title":"Not a comic book","year":"N/A","publisher":"N/A","isGraded":false,"grade":"VF"}')
Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'query: {d[\\"query\\"]}'\); print\(f'count: {d[\\"count\\"]}'\); print\(f'avg: {d.get\(\\"averageFormatted\\",\\"n/a\\"\)}'\)")

Bash(python -c "import sys,json; d=json.load\(sys.stdin\); print\(f'query: {d[\\"query\\"]}  attempt: {d.get\(\\"attemptUsed\\",\\"?\\"\)}  count: {d[\\"count\\"]}  avg: {d.get\(\\"averageFormatted\\",\\"n/a\\"\)}'\)")
